seo.title: 5-Day Beginner Yoga
seo.description: Yoga is for everybody! Learn the basics and start your journey.

trainers.bioBodi: Once Donna leads you through an alignment based yoga practice, you will never experience yoga the same way. A choreographer, professor and Artistic Director of Freespace Dance Company, she recently got her Masters in Social Work. Her dream is to merge her love of movement and mental health to help support people in living a life they desire.

data.descriptionShort: Yoga is for everybody! Learn the basics and start your journey.
data.descriptionLong: Want to try yoga but don't know where to start? No matter what your fitness or flexibility level, yoga expert Donna Scro Samori gently guides you through the basics step by step so you can feel confident.

commerce.title: BODi Membership Required
commerce.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

modules.equipment: Yoga Mat, Heart Rate Monitor*, Pillow*, Yoga Blocks*

modules.title: Is 5 Day Beginner Yoga Right For Me?
modules.content: If you're ready to begin your yoga journey but don't quite know where to start, expert Donna Scro Samori will ease you into it by introducing you to the basics in 5 short days. She will teach you fundamental, foundational poses focused on strength, balance, and calm. By the end of the week, you'll have the confidence to step into any class and experience all the benefits yoga has to offer.

modules.title: What Are The Workouts Like?
modules.content: You'll start with foundational breath work and work your way daily through strength, balance and flexibility poses. Each 15 minute session builds skill from the previous day, and on Day 5 you will combine everything you've learned in a 20 minute celebration! Donna's gentle guidance encourages you to go at your own pace and listen to your body. For best results, follow the calendar provided.

modules.title: What Equipment Do I Need?
modules.content: No equipment is needed to complete 5 Day Beginner Yoga, but for optimum comfort, we recommend using a yoga mat and keeping a pillow or a yoga block handy.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Once Donna leads you through an alignment based yoga practice, you will never experience yoga the same way. A choreographer, professor and Artistic Director of Freespace Dance Company, she recently got her Masters in Social Work. Her dream is to merge her love of movement and mental health to help support people in living a life they desire.
